caption: DNS Activity
description: DNS Activity events report DNS queries and answers as seen on the network.
name: dns_activity

6.caption: Traffic
6.description: Bidirectional DNS request and response traffic.

flag_ids.caption: DNS Header Flags
flag_ids.description: The list of DNS message header flag IDs. For Query events, populated from the query header (RD, CD). For Response and Traffic events, populated from the response header, which is the complete and authoritative source as it echoes all client-set flags and adds server-set flags.

1.caption: Authoritative Answer
1.description: The responding server is authoritative for the domain. Set by the server in responses only.

2.caption: Truncated Response
2.description: The response was truncated because it exceeded the maximum UDP message size.

3.caption: Recursion Desired
3.description: The client requests that the server perform recursive resolution. Set by the client and echoed in the response.

4.caption: Recursion Available
4.description: The server supports recursive resolution. Set by the server in responses.

5.caption: Authentic Data
5.description: All data in the response has been cryptographically verified (DNSSEC). Set by the server.

6.caption: Checking Disabled
6.description: The client requests that the server disable DNSSEC validation. Set by the client and echoed in the response.

flags.caption: DNS Header Flags
flags.description: The list of DNS message header flags, normalized to the captions of the flag_ids values.

rcode.description: The DNS server response code, normalized to the caption of the rcode_id value. In the case of 'Other', it is defined by the event source.

rcode_id.caption: Response Code ID
rcode_id.description: The normalized identifier of the DNS server response code. See RFC-6895.

6.caption: YXDomain
6.description: Name Exists when it should not.

7.caption: YXRRSet
7.description: RR Set Exists when it should not.

8.caption: NXRRSet
8.description: RR Set that should exist does not.

9.caption: NotAuth
9.description: Not Authorized or Server Not Authoritative for zone.

16.caption: BADVERS
16.description: Bad EDNS OPT Version. Indicates that the client requested an EDNS version that the server does not support.

24.caption: Unassigned
24.description: The codes deemed to be unassigned by the RFC (unassigned codes: 12-15, 24-3840, 4096-65534).

25.caption: Reserved
25.description: The codes deemed to be reserved by the RFC (codes: 3841-4095, 65535).

99.caption: Other
99.description: The dns response code is not defined by the RFC.

transaction_id.caption: DNS Transaction ID
transaction_id.description: The 16-bit DNS transaction identifier assigned by the client and echoed unchanged in the server response. This value is the same for both the query and response messages.
